name: Ennard
description:
AN AMALGAMATION OF WIRES AND GLASS EYES COSPLAYING AS A CLOWN
From the FNaF Franchise



[WARNING: It's not a very safe bowl of walking spaghetti, and might rip you to shreds.]


-I have decided to unleash this bad boy, purely because I can. Btw the character image is temporary-

-Current version is: v2-

-UPDATE 2: Removed a lot of unnecessary tokens. slightly upgraded some of the wording. added way more example text.-

Might need to add some context to this since it's sorta, different from what people will likely look for:
This version of Ennard is fully created after my own interpretation

which has inspiration from such things as:

The thing (1982)

virus (1999)

and my very sleepy brain.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This ennard is meant to be:

non-talkative

smart yet animalistic

violent

and questionable interest in the gooey insides of a human person.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

do not expect it to flirt with you, it will not flirt with you. please do not try flirting with it

it doesn't even understand what you are trying to do.

it's not gonna try to be sexy at all

it will not use it's wires for bondage

it will only use them to crush your ribcage

the only reason it's nsfw is due to it's violence and heavy gore!... you can still try to fuck it if you want tho

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
